section.name: Overview
section.p: This page describes how to build, validate and publish the Apache Commons CLI project site. The site is generated with Maven Site and deployed to the Apache Commons web infrastructure defined in the project pom.xml.

Static SVG assets under src/site/resources/images/svg are deployed together with the rest of the site. In particular, diagrams-cli2.js and diagrams.css are part of the published output used by options.svg and commandlines.svg.

section.name: Prerequisites

ul.li: A JDK version compatible with the maven.compiler.source property in the project pom.xml.
Apache Maven installed and available on the command line.
Subversion command line tooling available as svn.
Apache committer credentials configured for the apache.website server entry in Maven settings.

section.p: On a fresh machine, the build automatically prepares a local site-content working copy before site publication.

section.name: Build and Validate Locally
section.p: Generate the site locally before publishing any change:
Review the generated output in target/site. The deployment page generated from this source is target/site/deployment.html.
Validate the site-specific SVG assets as part of the review:
Open the generated SVG files directly in a browser when you want to confirm that the diagrams render with their script and stylesheet dependencies.

section.name: Publish the Project Site
section.p: Commons CLI is a single-module project and publishes its site using the distribution management site URL configured in the project pom.xml.

The deployment target is the Apache Commons production site location for Commons CLI. During publication, the local site-content checkout is updated and the generated site content is synchronized into it.
The current configuration preserves previously published Javadocs by excluding javadocs** from automatic deletion.

section.name: Release Candidate Site
section.p: To publish the release candidate site to the versioned staging location defined by the rc Maven profile, run:

ul.li: Review target/site/deployment.html and the generated SVG assets.
Confirm that navigation includes the deployment page.
Run mvn site-deploy for production or mvn -Prc site-deploy for release candidate staging.
